description: From domain and the single Reply-To domain agree (both example.com) on an otherwise clean, trusted, all-passing message. replyToDomainMatchesFromDomain is true and no replyTo.domainMismatch signal is emitted. Demonstrates the quiet baseline the consistency rule must not disturb.

authentication-results: mx.example.net; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com
